desc: Static RE of the op-115 stall: first PHY-IP PLL RMW at 0x417040090 printed its pre-line and never completed (done/2026-07-14-t6040-pcie-phy-diagnostic.md). Disassemble the paired kernelcache PHY-IP PLL path for missing preconditions (poll/ack ordering, e.g. PHY-clock-enable at 0x417008008 bit0 is only polled after op 348; read- vs write-side stall; aperture) and emit an evidence-backed bounded manifest for ticket 002. Complements 013
author: fable
